rules.rule_text:
title: Microsoft Teams Phishing Call
id: 60ca259a-3e0a-432e-b912-1951576862ec
description: TTPs observed in an Incident Response engagement, where a foreign user
  initiates a Teams call and pretends to be from the internal IT help desk, trying
  to coerce the user into installing a remote management tool that grants them access
  to the computer.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-12-13
logsource:
  product: m365
  service: teams
detection:
  selection_external_chat:
    Workload|cased: MicrosoftTeams
    Operation|cased: ChatCreated
    ParticipantInfo.HasForeignTenantUsers: 'true'
  selection_suspicious_name:
  - Members.DisplayName|contains:
    - Help Desk Manager
  - Members.DisplayName|re:
    - '[^\x00-\x7F]{10,}'
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
tags:
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1566.004
level: critical
